tagline: Cutting-Edge Pool Service, Repair & Construction in Phoenix

hero.headline: See Every Detail of Your Pool's Care
hero.subheadline: Pool Agency is the only pool company in Phoenix that lets you view before-and-after photos and full chemical data from every service visit online. Backed by 20 years of expertise and Hayward-authorized repairs, we handle everything so you just dive in.
checkmarks: Online portal with photos & chemical data

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Weekly Cleaning to New Construction
services.subtitle: From your first call to your last splash of the season, Pool Agency covers every aspect of pool ownership with cutting-edge technology and Hayward-certified expertise.

cards.title: Weekly Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly pool service with online access to before-and-after photos and chemical data from every visit. Your first 4 weeks are on us.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: As a Hayward Authorized Service Center, we diagnose and fix pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems with a full warranty on every repair.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced technology pinpoints leaks in plumbing, shells, and equipment fast — minimizing water loss and preventing costly structural damage.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing keeps your water safe, crystal clear, and gentle on skin. Full data from every test available through your online portal.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Resurfacing, tile replacement, deck updates, and equipment upgrades. We modernize your pool with the latest products and technology in the industry.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed pools built from concept to first splash. We handle every detail so your new pool fits your backyard, style, and budget perfectly.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Smarter Pool Experience

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll come out, inspect everything, and give you an honest quote — no pressure, no obligations. New clients get 4 weeks free.

steps.title: We Service & Document Everything
steps.description: Our Hayward-certified technicians arrive on schedule and handle all cleaning, chemicals, and equipment checks. Every visit is documented with photos and chemical data in your online portal.

steps.title: Enjoy Total Transparency
steps.description: View before-and-after pictures and full chemical reports from every service visit online. You always know exactly what was done, and all our work is fully warranted.

about.label: Why Phoenix Trusts Pool Agency
about.headline: 20 Years of Innovation in Pool Care
about.description: Since 2006, Pool Agency has been on the cutting edge of the pool industry in Phoenix. We were the first pool company to develop custom software so clients can view before-and-after photos and chemical data from every service visit. As a Hayward Authorized Service Center with an A+ BBB rating, we combine tech-forward transparency with hands-on expertise that covers everything from weekly cleaning to new construction.

features.title: Online Service Portal
features.description: We built custom software so you can see before-and-after photos and chemical data from every single service visit — a first in the industry.

features.title: Hayward Certified Repairs
features.description: As a Hayward Authorized Service Center, every equipment repair comes with a full warranty. We handle all major brands with confidence.

features.title: Full Warranty on All Work
features.description: Pool Agency warrants all work performed. Combined with our A+ BBB rating and 20 years in business, your investment is always protected.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. First 4 Weeks Free.
pricing.subtitle: New clients start with 4 complimentary weeks of service. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest pool care you can verify online.

guarantee.headline: Our "Total Transparency" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every service visit is documented with before-and-after photos and full chemical data in your online portal. If you're ever not satisfied with a visit, we come back and make it right at no charge. With an A+ BBB rating and 20 years in business, we stand behind every job we do — and we prove it with the data.

faqs.question: What makes Pool Agency different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're the first and only pool company to develop custom software that lets you view before-and-after photos and full chemical data from every service visit online. Combined with our Hayward Authorized Service Center status and A+ BBB rating, you get a level of transparency and expertise that's unmatched in Phoenix.

faqs.question: Do new clients really get 4 weeks free?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Your first 4 weeks of weekly pool service are completely free — no strings attached. We believe once you experience our service and online portal, you'll see the Pool Agency difference for yourself.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the Phoenix metro?
faqs.answer: We service Phoenix, Scottsdale, North Phoenix, Glendale, Peoria, and surrounding Maricopa County areas. If you're unsure whether we cover your neighborhood, give us a call and we'll let you know right away.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pool Agency is licensed with the Arizona Registrar of Contractors, fully insured, and maintains an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau. We're also a Hayward Authorized Service Center, meaning our technicians are factory-trained on all major equipment.

faqs.question: Can you handle pool construction and remodeling too?
faqs.answer: We're a true full-service pool company. From weekly cleaning and equipment repair to complete remodels and brand-new pool construction, Pool Agency handles it all. One company, one relationship, every pool need covered.

testimonials.name: Yelp Reviewer
testimonials.text: Pool Agency has always been on the cutting edge of technology and provides excellent service with full transparency through their online portal. I can see exactly what they did each week.

testimonials.name: Phoenix Homeowner
testimonials.text: They were the only pool company that let me see before and after pictures and chemical data from every single service visit online. That kind of transparency earned my trust immediately.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: As a Hayward Authorized Service Center, Pool Agency handled all of our equipment repairs with a full warranty. Professional, reliable, and they stand behind their work every time.
